fundamentals.name: Datadog, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Datadog, Inc. operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications in the United States and internationally. The company's products comprise infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, observability pipelines, synthetics, real user monitoring, product analytics, continuous profiler, database monitoring, data observability, LLM observability, error tracking, network monitoring, incident response, workflow automation and App builder, event management, bits AI SRE, cloud cost management, cloud security, code security, cloud SIEM, threat management, sensitive data scanner, and CI visibility. Datadog, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with impressive revenue and earnings expansion, but trades at a very high valuation and has thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates with EPS of $0.60 vs $0.51 expected; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY, with quarterly earnings growth at 113.4%.
Forward P/E of 80.29x, while high, is significantly lower than trailing P/E of 571.26x.
Analyst consensus is strong buy with a mean target of $223.93.
negatives: Operating margin is only 0.8%, and profit margin is 3.7%.
Return on equity is 3.9% and return on assets is -0.2%.

news.paragraph: Datadog (DDOG) is seeing mixed analyst sentiment, with JPMorgan maintaining a bullish outlook and seeing 43% upside, while Goldman Sachs raised its target but reiterated a sell rating. Recent articles highlight the company's strong performance, with one suggesting it's outperforming Microsoft and Adobe in 2026, and another noting its benefit from AI production. The company also recently surpassed $1 billion in quarterly revenue and raised its 2026 outlook.
